name: pulsar-lwc
description: Shared Lightning Web Component scaffold for Salesforce and Pulsar runtimes

scripts.check: find force-app/main/default/lwc pulsar-app/src scripts -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n 1 node --check
scripts.build:pulsar: mkdir -p dist/pulsar-app && cp pulsar-app/index.html dist/pulsar-app/index.html && rollup -c rollup.config.mjs
